title: Karvoss II

{{Quote|Various records note that the first Matukai was a human female from the world of Karvoss II who discovered her ability to touch the Force while practicing a form of meditative martial arts.|Tionne Solusar, ''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force''|<ref name="JvS" />}}
'''Karvoss II''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds']] [[Parmorak sector/Legends|Parmorak sector]]. After the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], a [[Unidentified Human female (Matukai)|Human female]] from Karvoss II discovered her [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitivity]] while practicing a [[Unidentified martial arts form|form]] of [[Unarmed combat/Legends|martial arts]]. She eventually went on to create the [[Matukai/Legends|Matukai]] sect of Force-users.

By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] visited Karvoss II, where he met the undercover Rebel [[Saboteur/Legends|saboteur]] [[Aimi Loto]]. While there, Loto warned Cracken to be wary during his upcoming mission of [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droids]] she had secretly sabotaged.

==Description==
Karvoss II was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="JvS" /> located in the [[Karvoss system/Legends|Karvoss system]], a part of the [[Parmorak sector/Legends|Parmorak sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Southern Core]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="EAOC" /> A terrestrial<ref name="CRO" /> world,<ref name="JvS" /> it occupied the second [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position in its [[Star system/Legends|star system]].<ref name="JATM" />

==History==
{{Quote|I first met Aimi when my R2 unit malfunctioned on Karvoss II.|Personal addendum by Airen Cracken to a datafile detailing Rebel Alliance operatives|<ref name="CRO" />}}
[[File:AimiLoto-CRO.png|thumb|right|200px|Airen Cracken met Aimi Loto (pictured) on Karvoss II.]]
At some point after the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]<ref name="JATM" /> of [[3996 BBY]], a [[Unidentified Human female (Matukai)|Human female]] from Karvoss II was practicing a [[Unidentified martial arts form|form]] of [[Meditation/Legends|meditative]] [[Unarmed combat/Legends|martial arts]]. During her practice, the [[Human/Legends|Human]] discovered her ability to [[Force-sensitive/Legends|access]] the [[Force field/Legends|energy field]] known as [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. She eventually became a relatively powerful Force-user and founded the sect of Force-sensitives known as the [[Matukai/Legends|Matukai]].<ref name="JvS" />

[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] visited Karvoss II with an [[Unidentified R2 unit (Airen Cracken)|R2-series astromech droid]] by the [[Time/Legends|time]] the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] was fought<ref name="CRO" /> nearly [[0 BBY/Legends|4,000 years]] later.<ref name="JvS" /> While there, Cracken's [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2 unit]] malfunctioned. Subsequently, he met the young Human [[Aimi Loto]], who was posing as an itinerant [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Technician/Legends|maintenance specialist]] in tandem with her mechanical companion, [[MdZ-BLK]]—however, in reality, the two were Rebel [[Saboteur/Legends|saboteurs]].<ref name="CRO" />

Eventually, Loto learned from the malfunctioning [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech]] that Cracken was on a mission to facilitate the defection of the [[Nile Owen's personal assistant|personal assistant]] of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Nile Owen]] during the [[Wedding of Moff Nile Owen's daughter|wedding]] of [[Nile Owen's daughter|Owen's daughter]]. Under the cover of MdZ-BLK's loud laughter, Loto then whispered a warning for Cracken to keep his distance from the [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droids]] present at the wedding celebration, for she and her companion had sabotaged most of them.<ref name="CRO" />

Subsequently, Cracken described his experience on Karvoss II in a personal addendum to a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] detailing Rebel [[operative]]s.<ref name="CRO" /> In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], [[Jedi historian]] [[Tionne Solusar]] noted the fact that the Matukai founder hailed from Karvoss II in the compendium ''[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force]]''.<ref name="JvS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Karvoss II was created by [[Chuck Truett]] and introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Karvoss system, and therefore Karvoss II, in grid M-12.<ref name="TEA" />
